message: okay, we're actually doing this - jalapeño corn dog bites are going live today and I'm somehow more nervous than I was on monday. everyone ready?
Nervous is fine - we did the work, it's solid, just let it live now.
You're right - we tested this thing to death and it held up every single time.
The ratios stayed true because you questioned everything - that's what most people don't bother with.
Yeah, the questioning is what made it real - we could've coasted on "crispy exterior" but you pushed for the 60-40 threshold and suddenly the whole thing had teeth.
Most people skip the threshold work entirely - they just wing it and hope. You didn't. That matters more than you think it does.
